summary: Iteration 116: All 7 Critical Bug Fixes Verified - 12/12 backend tests PASSED, all frontend UI tests PASSED. All stale data issues resolved, forgot password flow working, license conversion preserves data, dashboard projections working.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Issue 1/3/4 (P0) FIXED: Dashboard shows dynamic account_value=$6,530.00 (not stale $798.57 or $5000)
✅ Issue 3 (P1) FIXED: /api/profit/licensee/daily-projection starts from effective_start_date (2026-01-20), not just February
✅ Issue 4 (P1) FIXED: Forgot Password UI present on login page with 'Reset Your Password' dialog, backend endpoints /api/auth/forgot-password and /api/auth/reset-password working
✅ Issue 5 (P1) FIXED: Dashboard Growth Projections showing 1yr=$72.6K, 2yr=$808K, 3yr=$9.80M, 5yr=$1.11B - NOT stuck on 'Loading projections...'
✅ Issue 6 (P2) FIXED: License conversion honorary↔honorary_fa preserves same license_id, starting_amount, effective_start_date
✅ Issue 7 (P2) FIXED: Admin Add Family Member endpoint /api/admin/family/members/{userId} exists and returns proper response
✅ Total Trades for licensee correctly counts master admin trade days (20 trades)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 7 bug fixes verified via UI

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 critical bugs from the user report have been fixed and verified. Rizza Miles is an honorary_fa licensee with starting=$5000, current dynamic=$6530, effective_start=2026-01-20. The license conversion for honorary↔honorary_fa is now IN-PLACE (same license_id preserved). Dashboard shows Growth Projections with quarterly compounding. Forgot Password flow works via token-based reset.

issue_1_3_4_stale_data.verification: Dashboard shows Account Value: $6,530.00, Total Profit: $1,530.00, Total Trades: 20, Performance: 30.6%

issue_3_projection_history.verification: Profit Tracker shows effective_start_date=Tuesday, January 20, 2026; /api/profit/licensee/daily-projection starts from 2026-01-20

issue_4_forgot_password.verification: Login page has 'Forgot Password?' link; dialog shows 'Reset Your Password' with email input; /api/auth/forgot-password and /api/auth/reset-password endpoints working

issue_5_dashboard_loading.verification: Growth Projections section shows 1yr=$72.6K, 2yr=$808K, 3yr=$9.80M, 5yr=$1.11B; No 'Loading projections...' stuck state

issue_6_license_conversion.verification: POST /api/admin/licenses/{id}/change-type for honorary↔honorary_fa returns same license_id; starting_amount, current_amount, effective_start_date preserved

issue_7_admin_family_member.verification: POST /api/admin/family/members/{userId} endpoint exists and returns proper response (not 404)
